headline: A Texas man went $15K into debt buying Pokémon cards to flip — he's sold zero, and Dave Ramsey lets him have it
summary: A wannabe Pokémon reseller is stuck with a bunch of unsold cards and $15K in debt. Here’s what Dave Ramsey has to say about this “stupid” life decision.

headline: GameStop reaffirms eBay takeover bid, raises fiscal 2026 outlook
summary: The video game retailer said it expects adjusted EBITDA to top $600 million this year, up from $345 million in fiscal 2025

headline: GameStop Shares Edge Higher as Company Reaffirms Pursuit of eBay Acquisition (GME)
summary: GameStop (NYSE:GME) shares rose 1. 4% in premarket trading to $22.
